prompt: A narrow, abandoned corridor stretches into the distance, flanked by walls with peeling, faded paint. The floor is cracked concrete, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. On the left, an old arcade machine stands forgotten, its screen dark. Rusted metal railings line both sides of the walkway, their surfaces corroded and bent. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a dim, cool glow that highlights the decay. At the far end, a set of stairs ascends into shadow, framed by the crumbling architecture. The scene feels quiet and still, as if time has long since stopped here.The camera moves forward, gradually approaching the stairs. As it advances, the perspective shifts, bringing the worn railings and the arcade machine closer into view. The cracks in the floor become more prominent, and the weeds appear more vibrant against the gray stone. The distant stairs grow larger, their steps worn and dark, hinting at a passage beyond the decayed corridor. The atmosphere grows more intimate, drawing the viewer deeper into the forgotten space.
